entry.title: 1268. Search Suggestions System
entry.content:
LeetCode

link
Approach 1: Trie, Time: O(key_length), Space: O(ALPHABET_SIZE key_length N) where N is number of keys in Trie

link
Approach 2: Sort and Binary Search the Prefix

entry.title: Amazon
entry.content:
• Amazon Online Assessment Questions
  • Amazon summary
  • 零件组装题
  • 城市建路题
  • find substrings
  • Amazon | OA 2020 | Top K Frequently Mentioned Keywords -> 692. Top K Frequent Words
  • [Amazon | OA 2019 | Treasure Island] Description Code -> 994. Rotting Oranges
  • [Amazon | OA 2019 | Find Pair With Given Sum] Code
  • [Optimal Utilization, 04/20] Description Code
  • Amazon | OA 2019 | Top N competitors & Zombie in Matrix, 04/01
  • [Amazon | OA 2019 | Zombie in Matrix, 02/26|03/10] Description Code -> 994. Rotting Oranges
  • [Amazon | OA 2019 | Critical Routers] Description Code
  • [Amazon | Min Cost to Connect Ropes / Min Time to Merge Files] Description Code
  • 200. Number of Islands, 07/02|05/08|03/07
  • 692. Top K Frequent Words, 05/31|06/20|06/19|05/10|04/17
  • 937. Reorder Data in Log Files, 07/02|05/31|06/20|06/19|05/10|05/08|04/20|04/17
  • 763. Partition Labels, 06/03
  • 819. Most Common Word, 06/03
  • 588. Design In-Memory File System
  • 1192. Critical Connections in a Network, 03/26
  • 240. Search a 2D Matrix II, 03/25
  • [994. Rotting Oranges, 03/04|03/07] Description Code
  • 1. Two Sum, 04/21
  • 1162. As Far from Land as Possible, 03/04
  • 683. K Empty Slots
  • 1268. Search Suggestions System

entry.title: 347. Top K Frequent Elements
entry.content:
LeetCode

HashMap + Heap, Time complexity: O(Nlogk)

entry.title: 692. Top K Frequent Words
entry.content:
LeetCode

Approach #1: Sorting [Accepted], Time Complexity: O(NlogN)

Approach #2: Heap [Accepted], Time Complexity: O(Nlogk)
